pages.text: Dropped occasionally by defeating the Calamity Chancellor.$(br)Grants consumer:$(br)$(li)Nourishment (30 minutes)$(li)Opportunity III (10 minutes)$(li)Dexterity III (10 minutes)$(li)Resistance II (10 minutes)$(li)Upon consumption, kills surrounding Allays/Vexes/Glowsquitos and certain “living familycreatures” by alex668, restoring HP equal to the sum of the slain units' max health. Can be consumed up to 8 times.
